title: ponerorchis crenulata
intro: Ponerorchis crenulata, also known as the "Mountain Ponerorchis" or "Dwarf Ponerorchis," is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family (Orchidaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiviral and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Ponerorchis crenulata include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
